alternatives.name: Ultrasonic transit-time inline flowmeter
alternatives.tradeoffs: Requires acoustic coupling; air bubbles >2% vol degrade accuracy; needs 5–10× DN straight pipe run; pipe must be fully filled; accuracy depends on correct fluid-type configuration at commissioning [SRC: 01_product_decomposition, web_search]

alternatives.name: Electromagnetic (mag) flowmeter
alternatives.tradeoffs: Requires conductive fluid >5 μS/cm (excludes deionized water, glycol); higher power (5–20 W vs <1 W); 2–3× unit cost at DN15–DN25; no temperature co-measurement; larger installation footprint [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: Coriolis mass flowmeter
alternatives.tradeoffs: 5–10× unit cost ($200–500 vs $20–60 OEM); significant weight (5–50 kg vs 0.3 kg); inherent pressure drop from bent tube geometry; provides mass flow + density but overkill for volumetric water circuits [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: Turbine / impeller flowmeter
alternatives.tradeoffs: Lowest unit cost ($5–20 OEM); moving parts degrade with glycol/particulates; bearing wear limits life to 2–3 years; creates pressure drop; glycol-intolerant; no bidirectional detection [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: No measurement / pump-curve inference
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero hardware cost; zero installation effort; accuracy ±10–20% at best; no fault detection; no trend data; no regulatory compliance capability [ASM]
